rectified_nodes.fix_description: Connected function's final computation (b15) to its definition (b1) via data_flow, implying b1 uses b15's result as its return.
Added data_flow from function definition b1 to its control flow entry b2, providing necessary context/data.
Replaced control_flow with data_flow for edge b4 -> b5.
Added data_flow from call b8 to assignment b9.
Added data_flow from assignment b9 to assignment b10.
Connected orphaned assignment b15 to function b1 as its return value via data_flow.
